per_method_summary: schemas/per_method_summary.csv (header only) -- includes both official (metric_registry.json official_nextgqa_metrics) and diagnostic-only columns, columns explicitly prefixed/labeled so they are never confused
statistical_outputs: schemas/bootstrap_statistics.csv (header only) -- per-video cluster bootstrap, 10000 replicates, paired method differences, CI lower/upper, fraction_above_zero, shared video/question counts
populate_policy: Populated only by commands 16 (run_bootstrap_statistics) and later, none of which are executed by this setup task.
